title: OH Fatima, I will always miss you..
content: To my first ever school and last also when i entered for the first time i don't know how was i'm may be like every other child i was crying and doing other stuffs but when i was move out from you i was about to cry those days those memories everything was  feel like heaven whenever i look back i found myself in that same auditorium where all 10th sits together and me n my gang occupied last row last bench and no one have guts to take or sit on that particular seat and whole lectures we all just laugh.. I will carry that memories for forever and I'll always cherish them.
